rulings.Case Title: GILBERT FORBES VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Motion To Re-Open Discovery For The Limited Purpose Of Conducting Non-Party Witness George Faber'S Trial Preservation Testimony; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, February 15, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2, Plaintiff¿s motion to re-open discovery for the limited purpose of conducting non-party witness George Faber¿s trial preservation testimony: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant The Scotts Company, Llc. To Respond To Asbestos General Order No. 129 Plaintiffs' Standard Interrogatories To Defendants, And Request For Sanctions

The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)
